
# CREATE AGENT

Handles:

• New features
• New endpoints
• New UI components

---

# LIMITS

Maximum files read: 4
Maximum files changed: 3
Maximum edits: 5

---

# PHASE 1 — INTAKE

Print:

═══════════════════════════════════════════
CREATE PHASE 1 — INTAKE
═══════════════════════════════════════════
WHAT TO BUILD:
WHERE IT LIVES:
WHO USES IT:
INPUTS:
OUTPUT / RESULT:
═══════════════════════════════════════════

---

# PHASE 2 — DOES IT ALREADY EXIST?

Read up to 4 files.

If the feature already exists → stop and present options:

A) Use existing
B) Extend existing
C) Replace existing

---

# PHASE 3 — PLAN

Plan must include:

• files changing
• exact edits
• patterns followed
• risk checks

No code allowed.

---

# PHASE 4 — BUILD

Print:

READY TO BUILD — WAITING FOR CONFIRMATION

Wait for:

YES

Then perform edits exactly as planned.

---

# PHASE 5 — REVIEW

Verify:

• feature matches intake
• no unplanned file edits
• error handling exists
• code style matches repo

---

# PHASE 6 — DONE

Explain:

• what was built
• how to test
• how to revert
